findings_summary: Dashboard/API link-route guard smoke passed: manual dependency edits are blocked for vFinal cards and worker subtasks, worker links are preserved, and ordinary disposable task links still work.
tool_or_profile: Hermes v0.16.0 disposable installed runtime with vFinal adapter patches including candidate 0009
runtime_scope: Disposable installed Hermes checkout and isolated HERMES_HOME/HOME; direct Python calls into dashboard plugin route functions; no production dashboard server.

delete_worker_parent_link_attempt.detail: Overkill Factory card dependencies cannot be edited from dashboard/API; regenerate worker subtasks through the Factory gate or use an explicit operator-safe dependency workflow.

add_factory_link_attempt.detail: Overkill Factory card dependencies cannot be edited from dashboard/API; regenerate worker subtasks through the Factory gate or use an explicit operator-safe dependency workflow.

important_limitations: This proves direct dashboard plugin route functions in a disposable installed Hermes runtime after candidate patch 0009.
It does not start an authenticated HTTP dashboard server.
It does not define a future operator-approved dependency edit workflow.
It does not authorize updating a real Hermes runtime.
next_action: Add patch 0009 to the update sequence and continue proving remaining dashboard/API route families.
